name: Cheesy Spanish Omelette
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil and butter in a medium-size flameproof skillet.
2. Add onion, garlic, bell pepper, cabbage, and bacon; fry over low heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add fenugreek and coriander; stir well.
4. Preheat broiler.
5. Whisk eggs with cold water, salt, and pepper; pour into skillet.
6. Swirl skillet to ensure an even coating.
7. Cook over low heat for 3-4 minutes, or until the mixture is golden brown underneath.
8. Sprinkle with cheese and place under preheated broiler until the mixture is set on top and the cheese has melted.
9. Cut into 4 wedges; garnish with bell pepper strips and parsley sprigs, if desired, and serve hot.
